title: koeleria spicata subsp. virescens
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. virescens, also known as green June grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. virescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant. Herbal preparations of Koeleria spicata subsp. virescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
